arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo gives advice Man City and Pep Guardiola need to follow
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest defeated Manchester City 1-0 thanks to Callum Hudson-Odoi's late goal and Pep Guardiola's Premier League champions could learn from their plucky opposition

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's damning Manchester City admission after Nottingham Forest defeat
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest earned an impressive win against Manchester City and extended their Premier League advantage over the reigning champions thanks to Callum Hudson-Odoi's goal

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola declares Man City must prepare for '10 finals' after loss to Nottingham Forest left his side facing a fight to finish in the top four
arts.sum: Callum Hudson-Odoi scored the only goal in the 83rd minute to secure a result that took Forest four points clear of City in the Premier League table after 28 rounds of fixtures.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest 1-0 Man City: Pep Guardiola equals unwanted record, makes "10 finals" claim after latest Premier League defeat
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola equals an unwanted personal record in his managerial career after watching his Man City side suffer a 1-0 defeat at Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man City: Pep Guardiola refuses to blame Ederson after mistake in defeat at Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Brazilian goalkeeper was at fault for Callum Hudson-Odoi’s late winner at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand pokes fun at Erling Haaland after Man City slip to their NINTH league defeat of the season at Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand took a cheeky dig at Erling Haaland after Man City's 1-0 defeat by Nottingham Forest on Saturday afternoon, which was their ninth of the season in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola tells Manchester City they need to earn Champions League spot
arts.sum: A defeat at Nottingham Forest could be a damaging one.

arts.ttl: Club were willing to spend $12m on Nottingham Forest man in January – He stopped transfer happening
arts.sum: Palmeiras were willing to spend $12m on Nottingham Forest forward Ramón Sosa in the January transfer window, but the Paraguayan blocked the move. That’s according to Versus, who provide more details on the bid for the player and why the move ultimately didn’t happen. They explain that Nottingham Forest received offers for the Paraguayan in The post Club were willing to spend $12m on Nottingham Forest man in January – He stopped transfer happening appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man City star slammed for role in Nottingham Forest winner after huge Champions League blow
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest claimed a famous 1-0 win over Manchester City on Saturday thanks to Callum Hudson-Odoi's winner, which Ederson should have saved after watching it fly in at his near post

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest fans all saying the same thing about Morgan Gibbs-White after Manchester City win
